'''Balig''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Talon Karrde]] for many years. He was a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] gunner on ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' during the [[Raid on Bilbringi]].

==Biography==
During the ''Wild Karrde''{{'s}} journey to [[Exocron]] to find the ex-smuggler [[Jorj Car'das]], he and [[Chal (Wild Karrde)|Chal]] manned the turbolasers as the crew blasted their way into [[Pembric II]] through the asteroids. He remained on the turbolasers during the battle with [[Rei'Kas]]'s [[Corsair (Derriphan-class)|''Corsair's'']] on the way to [[Dayark]], along with [[Griv]] and [[Shada D'ukal]]. He also was one of those undercover at the [[Ithor Loman]] while Karrde, Shada and C-3PO met with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jutka]].

==Personality and traits==
Balig was verbose and liked to tell anecdotes even during combat, much to Karrde's annoyance. He was a skilled gunner.<ref name="TTS" />

==Equipment==
He would wear [[Jumpsuit/Legends|flight coveralls]] and [[Boot/Legends|high spacer's boots]]. He wore a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] in a cross-draw [[Holster/Legends|holster.]]<ref name="TTS" />

{{Char-stub}}
